rules.name: company_bankhaus
rules.description: Matches 'Bankhaus' followed by a name, a specific pattern seen in the data.

rules.name: company_steuerberatung
rules.description: Matches 'Steuerberatungsgesellschaft' or similar professional firm names.

rules.name: company_fa_abbreviation
rules.description: Matches 'Fa.' followed by a company name (e.g., 'Fa. Bahrdt Digital').

rules.name: company_traunluftfahrt
rules.description: Matches 'TraunLuftfahrt' followed by 'Solutions' or other suffixes.

rules.name: company_sudversand
rules.description: Specific rule to capture 'SüdVersand' and similar CamelCase compound names that were missed by the context rule.

rules.name: company_hyphenated_gmbh
rules.description: Specifically matches hyphenated company names ending in GMBH/AG/KG to capture the full name (e.g., Kraftver-Gastronomie GMBH) before generic suffix rules.

rules.name: company_raiffeisenkasse
rules.description: Matches 'Raiffeisenkasse' followed by location, ensuring full capture of the bank name including hyphenated locations.

rules.name: company_pastl_bachle
rules.description: Specific rule to capture the hyphenated/plus-sign compound name 'Pastl+Bächle Handel' which was missed by generic rules.

rules.name: company_nordtraval
rules.description: Specific rule to capture 'NordTravalUmwelt AG' which was truncated by the generic CamelCase rule.

rules.name: company_ampersand_name
rules.description: Matches company names containing '&' with suffixes, now including 'OG' to prevent truncation.

rules.name: company_gmbh_co_kg
rules.description: Matches multi-word company names followed by 'GmbH & Co KG' (with variable whitespace), capturing the name part.

rules.name: company_firma_prefix
rules.description: Matches 'Firma' followed by a company name. Updated to ensure the capture group ($1) contains only the company name, excluding the prefix 'Firma', and handles single-word names correctly.

rules.name: tax_authority_fa
rules.description: Matches 'FA' followed by location including numbers. Updated to exclude trailing words like 'In', 'An', 'Der' using negative lookahead.

rules.name: company_raiffeisenbank
rules.description: Matches 'Raiffeisenbank' followed by location or name parts, including 'Bankstelle' and subsequent location identifiers. Updated to handle multi-word locations after Bankstelle.

rules.name: company_camelcase_industry
rules.description: Matches CamelCase compound names followed by industry terms. Added 'Marine', 'Transport', 'Digital' to the list of industry terms.

rules.name: company_u_and
rules.description: Matches company names containing 'u.' (und) followed by a suffix like GMBH/AG. Updated to capture the full name including the suffix.

rules.name: tax_authority_fa_complex
rules.description: Matches 'FA' with complex locations including 'am' and multi-word names. Updated to ensure full capture.

rules.name: tax_authority_finanzamt_complex
rules.description: Matches 'Finanzamt' followed by location including numbers like '1/23'. Updated to ensure full capture and handle specific multi-word locations like 'Braunau Ried Schärding'.

rules.name: company_nowothnig_wind
rules.description: Specific rule to capture 'Nowothnig Wind' which is a two-word proper noun without a suffix.

rules.name: company_www_fa
rules.description: Specific rule to capture 'www.FA...' patterns which are often missed or truncated by the standard FA rule.

rules.name: company_url_prefix
rules.description: Matches URLs or protocols preceding organization names (e.g., '://www.Donau Furtkraftwald AG').

rules.name: org_rentenversicherung_bund
rules.description: Matches 'Deutschen Rentenversicherung Bund' specifically.

rules.name: org_versorgungskasse_vvag
rules.description: Matches 'Versorgungskasse Deutscher Unternehmen VVaG' specifically.

rules.name: company_ampersand_plus
rules.description: Matches company names containing '+' or '&' with suffixes, specifically handling the '+' operator which was previously truncated. Ensures the full name including the '+' part is captured.

rules.name: org_verwaltungsgerichtshof
rules.description: Matches 'Verwaltungsgerichtshof' and its genitive form 'Verwaltungsgerichtshofes' or 'Verwaltungsgerichtshofs'.

rules.name: company_single_letter_gmbh
rules.description: Matches company names starting with a single letter followed by a hyphen and suffix (e.g., A-GmbH, B-GmbH).

rules.name: company_versicherungsag
rules.description: Matches company names ending in 'VersicherungsAG' (no space) or 'Versicherungs-AG'.

rules.name: company_da_deutsche_allgemeine
rules.description: Matches 'DA Deutsche Allgemeine Versicherung AG' pattern (Initial + Name + AG).

rules.name: org_bundesministerium_finanzen
rules.description: Matches 'Bundesministerium für Finanzen'.

rules.name: org_bhag
rules.description: Matches the specific acronym BHAG (Bundesheer-Haftungs- und Abwicklungs-Gesellschaft or similar context).

rules.name: org_cofag
rules.description: Matches the specific acronym COFAG (Central Office for the Settlement of Claims).

rules.name: org_finanzamt_oesterreich
rules.description: Matches 'Finanzamt Österreich' and its genitive form 'Finanzamtes Österreich', including parenthetical suffixes like (DST12).

rules.name: org_landespolizeidirektion
rules.description: Matches 'Landespolizeidirektion' followed by location (e.g., Wien).

rules.name: org_faoe
rules.description: Matches the abbreviation 'FAÖ' for Finanzamt Österreich.

rules.name: org_fag
rules.description: Matches the abbreviation 'FAG' for Finanzamt für Großbetriebe.

rules.name: org_ams_oesterreich
rules.description: Matches 'AMS Österreich' and 'Arbeitsmarktservice (AMS)'.

rules.name: org_bezirksgericht
rules.description: Matches 'Bezirksgericht' followed by a location name (e.g., Bezirksgericht Silz).

rules.name: org_landesgericht
rules.description: Matches 'Landesgericht' followed by a location name (e.g., Landesgericht Innsbruck).

rules.name: org_lg_abbreviation
rules.description: Matches the abbreviation 'LG' followed by a location or specific court identifier (e.g., LG Innsbruck, LG für ZRS Wien).

rules.name: org_verfassungsgerichtshof
rules.description: Matches 'Verfassungsgerichtshof' and its genitive form 'Verfassungsgerichtshofes'.

rules.name: org_finanzamt_oesterreich_genitive
rules.description: Matches 'Finanzamtes Österreich' (genitive case) with parenthetical suffixes.

rules.name: org_bundesministerium_justiz_genitive
rules.description: Matches 'Bundesministeriums für Justiz' (genitive case).

rules.name: org_eidgenoessische_invalidenversicherung
rules.description: Matches 'Eidgenössischen Invalidenversicherung' and optionally '(IV)'.

rules.name: org_schweizerische_unfallversicherungsanstalt
rules.description: Matches 'Schweizerischen Unfallversicherungsanstalt' and optionally '(SUVA)'.

rules.name: company_gmbh_co_kg_full
rules.description: Matches full company names ending in 'GmbH & Co KG' including the name part, ensuring the whole string is captured as one entity. Updated to handle multi-word names with '&' and 'und'.

rules.name: org_suva
rules.description: Matches the abbreviation 'SUVA' (Schweizerische Unfallversicherungsanstalt).

rules.name: org_kantonsspitals_st_gallen
rules.description: Matches 'Kantonsspitals St. Gallen' (genitive) and 'Kantonsspital St. Gallen' (nominative).

rules.name: org_steueramt_luzern
rules.description: Matches 'Steueramt des Kantons Luzern' and its genitive form 'Steueramtes des Kantons Luzern'.

rules.name: company_single_word_gmbh
rules.description: Matches single-word company names followed by GMBH/AG/KG. Lowered priority to ensure multi-word rules (including acronyms) take precedence.

rules.name: org_frontex
rules.description: Matches the specific organization 'Frontex' (European Border and Coast Guard Agency).

rules.name: org_bm_fuer_inneres
rules.description: Matches 'BM für Inneres' (Federal Ministry of the Interior).

rules.name: org_bmi
rules.description: Matches the abbreviation 'BMI' (Bundesministerium für Inneres).

rules.name: org_vwgh
rules.description: Matches the abbreviation 'VwGH' (Verwaltungsgerichtshof).

rules.name: org_kriminalpolizei_oesterreich
rules.description: Matches 'Kriminalpolizei in Österreich'.

rules.name: org_easo
rules.description: Matches the abbreviation 'EASO' (European Asylum Support Office).

rules.name: org_bundesministerium_fuer_inneres
rules.description: Matches 'Bundesministerium für Inneres'.

rules.name: org_flughafen_munchen
rules.description: Matches 'Flughafen München'.

rules.name: org_oecd
rules.description: Matches the abbreviation 'OECD'.

rules.name: org_verwaltungsgerichtshof_genitive
rules.description: Matches 'Verwaltungsgerichtshofes' and 'Verwaltungsgerichtshofs' (genitive forms).

rules.name: org_europaeische_grenzschutzagentur
rules.description: Matches 'Europäische Grenzschutzagentur Frontex' and its genitive form.

rules.name: org_europaeische_grenzschutzagentur_genitive
rules.description: Matches 'Europäischen Grenzschutzagentur Frontex' (genitive).

rules.name: org_bundesfinanzgericht_genitive
rules.description: Matches 'Bundesfinanzgerichts' (genitive case) specifically.

rules.name: org_ufs
rules.description: Matches the acronym 'UFS' (Unabhängiger Finanzsenat).

rules.name: company_multi_word_gmbh
rules.description: Matches multi-word company names ending in GmbH/AG/KG. Updated to allow the first word to be an all-caps acronym (e.g., KQPC) to prevent splitting 'KQPC Versand GMBH'.

rules.name: tax_authority_finanzamt_wr_neustadt
rules.description: Specific rule for 'Finanzamt Neunkirchen Wr. Neustadt' to handle spacing and abbreviations, including cases with double spaces.

rules.name: org_finanzpolizei
rules.description: Matches 'Finanzpolizei' followed by a location name.

rules.name: org_bfh
rules.description: Matches the abbreviation 'BFH' (Bundesfinanzhof).

rules.description: Matches 'London Film Academy' and the typo 'London Film Acadamy'.

rules.name: org_bundeskanzleramtes
rules.description: Matches 'Bundeskanzleramtes' (genitive case).

rules.name: tax_authority_finanzamt_wien_klosterneuburg
rules.description: Matches 'Finanzamtes Wien 9/18/19 Klosterneuburg' specifically to handle the complex location with numbers.

rules.description: Matches 'Finanzstrafsenat' followed by location (e.g., Wien 2).

rules.name: org_vfgh
rules.description: Matches the abbreviation 'VfGH' (Verwaltungsgerichtshof).

rules.name: company_reinemut_smoch
rules.description: Specific rule to capture 'Reinemut + Smoch Handel' which was missed by generic rules.

rules.name: company_steuerberatungs_gmbh
rules.description: Matches company names ending in 'Steuerberatungs GmbH' (singular 'Steuerberatungs' instead of 'Steuerberatungsgesellschaft').

rules.name: org_zollamt_oesterreich
rules.description: Matches 'Zollamt Österreich'.

rules.description: Matches 'Universität' followed by a location or name (e.g., Universität Innsbruck, Karl-Franzens- Universität Graz).

rules.description: Matches 'Fachhochschule' followed by a location or name (e.g., Fachhochschule Kärnten).

rules.description: Matches 'HLF' (Höhere Lehranstalt für) followed by a location (e.g., HLF Krems/Donau).

rules.description: Matches 'Amt für Betrugsbekämpfung' and its genitive form 'Amtes für Betrugsbekämpfung'.

rules.description: Matches 'F Personal GmbH' pattern.

rules.description: Matches the abbreviation 'ÖGK' (Österreichische Gesundheitskasse).

rules.description: Matches 'Bezirkshauptmannschaft' followed by a location name.

rules.name: company_senecura
rules.description: Matches 'SeneCura', 'Senecura', 'SENECURA' and their multi-word variations with 'Laurentius', 'Park', 'Bludenz' with flexible spacing/hyphens.
